sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gampa lakah tuuhonte tawh, zan giak, no tuucingte aw;
Pasian le mi om khawmzo hi, En un,
Hong paita un, Hong bia ta un, Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mipilte aw, lung geel nawn ke’n, a taangzaw khuavak en ve’n;
lian pen zong in, A aksi, no muzo tu’n
Hong paita un, Hong bia ta un, Suak thak Khazih hong bia

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thu khat in Topa A inn ah, hong kilang ding ci-in ah;
Ngak a, lawp a, lam-etna tawh, bia-a om
Hong paita un, Hong bia ta un, Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.
